chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Revision Application No.S-06 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Mr. Sikandar Ali Kolachi, advocate for applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, Deputy Prosecutor General Sindh. Respondent No.1 in person. = Heard counsel for applicant and respondent No.1 Haji Ghulam Mustafa, present in person. The site inspection report of Additional Register/Commissioner states that respondent No.1 is in physical possession of the disputed plot surrounded by old boundary wall. On the other hand, report of Mukhtiarkar/City Surveyor, Umerkot available at page No.39 confirmed that father of respondent No.1 is owner of 172 Sq. yards while applicant is owner of 171.5 sq. yards as per revenue entry dated 26.06.1994 which he has purchased under registered sale deed dated 22.06.1994. Prima facie, it seems that applicant was in possession of land since 1994 as read out in sale deed. Both parties agreed that a partition may be done through Mukhtiarkar/City Surveyor Umerkot at the first instance. Let Assistant Commissioner Umerkot and Mukhtiarkar/City Surveyor shall take necessary steps for partition of the land as per entitlement of the applicant and respondent No.1 between the applicant and respondent No.1 with consent of father of the respondent No.1 and identity land of the applicant within 10 days hereof. In view of above, instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of. Parties are at liberty to redress their grievances, if any, in accordance with law. JUDGE *Faisal*
